description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with a defined, athletic build and a neutral expression. The figure is depicted in a standing pose with arms slightly outstretched and legs apart, suggesting a relaxed but alert stance. She is wearing a minimal two-piece undergarment set, with a bandeau-style top and high-cut briefs, both featuring simple, clean lines. The skin is smooth and evenly toned, with subtle shading to indicate muscle definition and anatomical features. Her hair is styled in a neat bun at the back of her head, leaving the face and neck unobstructed. The overall appearance is clean, simplified, and suitable for use as a generic urban pedestrian in digital environments.
description: A stylized adult female figure in a standing pose, wearing a minimal two-piece undergarment set and sporting a neat bun hairstyle. The figure has a smooth, athletic build and a neutral expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, chest, and the front of the undergarment set, with arms and legs slightly apart.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the side of the bun hairstyle, as well as the side contours of the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, shoulder blades, and the back of the undergarment set, with the bun hairstyle clearly visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the face, chest, and the side of the bun, with arm and leg contours.
attribute_clothing_type: minimal two-piece undergarment set with bandeau top and high-cut briefs
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
attribute_hairstyle: short hair styled in a neat bun
